name: X-Change Life (Lorebook)
description:
UPDATE: there is a new version of this adventure you can find it here

This is an attempt to make the pornographic game x-change.life ⚠️ NSFW LINK ⚠️

The premise is that you're a male character headed to the mysterious place known as Summer City. In it are pills called x-change pills which instantly and painlessly swap you to the opposite sex.

This game features six different characters from the original game.

Frank: your stepdad. He's got a no-nonsense attitude and likes you doing chores maybe a little too much.
Alexia: your stepsister. Bratty, playful, friendly, wants you to take a pill and get dicked down.
Hollis: your best friend, he's friendly and a pretty boy, wonder what he'd think if his best friend was a girl 🤔
Michael: pervert sales manager at DynaPill, an X-Change marketing company.
Bruce: rich fuckboy. Beware of breeding tendencies.
Aphrodite: the AI that made X-Change. Friendly, benevolent, and occasional DJ

Additional NPCs will be about, but they won't persist between scenes.

Instructions

make a persona with a male name. In the game, you will swap from male to female as appropriate

The game is mostly smut, but has a lot of pregnancy-related themes. Pregnancy content is avoidable for the most part.

🚩 Content warnings: potential dubcon or noncon due to drugging, possible forced feminization, pregnancy and breeding content, cringy co-workers, douchebags at the bar, forced drugging, peer pressure to pop pills (Alexia will possibly shove one down your throat if you hesitate)

Step family incest is a part of the original game, and while it's not my thing I decided to include it since it's an integral part of the universe.

Other RP tips

The reason you're in Summer City isn't defined; it's implied you need a place to stay, but your actual reasoning is up to you. You can add information to chat memory to give yourself a reason to be there.

I recommend giving yourself a last name. Frank and Alexia don't have one, so if you're using a powerful enough AI, it should figure out that's their last name. DeepSeek has given Frank the last name "Maddox" erroneously in testing for me.

You can "cheat" by modifying the status section at the start (want more starting money? Now you have $10k!). The bot operates like a large sandbox for kinky adults.

This bot has a tendency to assume your actions if you give short responses this is intended. It's meant to be a text adventure where sexy things happen to you.

On the Status Section

The status section should update at the start of each message. If it doesn't appear on its own, regenerate it as well.

Don't be afraid to edit it too. Sometimes LLMs mess up. The initial responses have a blank field for your female name, the LLM has been instructed

🐳 This bot was tested with DeepSeek! If you haven't seen it you should use this tutorial to set it up! 🐳

Bonus: 🎶
creator: Mysteras
